name: Smoldering Flaunt
descrip: Get all your opponents hot and bothered with your stunning good looks and a few seductive words. Can charm opponents. Can't be in a stance.
outcome: [AttackerName] poses seductively, showing off [AttackerHisOrHer] muscles, letting [AttackerHisOrHer] gaze flit about as [AttackerHeOrShe] makes sexual and seductive proclamations, and [TargetName] flushes at the sexually charged display.
miss: [AttackerName] poses seductively, showing off [AttackerHisOrHer] muscles, letting [AttackerHisOrHer] gaze flit about as [AttackerHeOrShe] makes sexual and seductive proclamations, but [TargetName] appears to be unaffected.
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind is filled with sexual fantasies from [AttackerName]'s seductive body. [TargetName] has been charmed!
